mano_cua.result_summary: mermaid erDiagram含双引号字段描述(VarChar等)时渲染完全失败，预览面板空白无图形显示
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The mermaid erDiagram code with double quotes containing VarChar descriptions is NOT rendering at all in the right preview panel. The preview area is completely blank/white. This is a rendering bug - when a mermaid erDiagram contains double quotes for field descriptions and relationship labels, the mermaid diagram fails to render completely.
